<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Verify block is back at initial position and map the full maze
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: {node['boundary']}")
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue: {node['boundary']}")

# Now let me look at the full maze to understand the path
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nFull maze area (rows 8-50, cols 12-55):")
for i in range(8, 50):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][12:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
